detectors.description:
CryptoRoulette.kill() (CryptoRoulette.sol#99-107) uses timestamp for comparisons
	Dangerous comparisons:
	- msg.sender == ownerAddr && now > lastPlayed + 86400 (CryptoRoulette.sol#101)

detectors.description:
Deprecated standard detected secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 16 (CryptoRoulette.sol#49):
	- Usage of "block.blockhash()" should be replaced with "blockhash()"
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"
detectors.markdown:
Deprecated standard detected [secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 16](CryptoRoulette.sol#L49):
	- Usage of "block.blockhash()" should be replaced with "blockhash()"
	- Usage of "sha3()" should be replaced with "keccak256()"

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.4.24 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)

	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup
	- ImplicitConstructorCallvalueCheck
	- TupleAssignmentMultiStackSlotComponents
	- MemoryArrayCreationOverflow
	- privateCanBeOverridden
	- SignedArrayStorageCopy
	- ABIEncoderV2StorageArrayWithMultiSlotElement
	- DynamicConstructorArgumentsClippedABIV2
	- UninitializedFunctionPointerInConstructor_0.4.x
	- IncorrectEventSignatureInLibraries_0.4.x
	- ABIEncoderV2PackedStorage_0.4.x
	- ExpExponentCleanup
	- EventStructWrongData.
It is used by:
	- ^0.4.24 (CryptoRoulette.sol#1)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in CryptoRoulette.play(uint256) (CryptoRoulette.sol#55-95):
	External calls:
	- msg.sender.transfer(this.balance) (CryptoRoulette.sol#77)
	- msg.sender.transfer(msg.value * 15) (CryptoRoulette.sol#83)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- lastPlayed = now (CryptoRoulette.sol#93)
	- generateNewRandom() (CryptoRoulette.sol#91)
		- secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 16 (CryptoRoulette.sol#49)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [CryptoRoulette.play(uint256)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L55-L95):
	External calls:
	- [msg.sender.transfer(this.balance)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L77)
	- [msg.sender.transfer(msg.value * 15)](CryptoRoulette.sol#L83)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [lastPlayed = now](CryptoRoulette.sol#L93)
	- [generateNewRandom()](CryptoRoulette.sol#L91)
		- [secretNumber = uint8(sha3()(now,block.blockhash(block.number - 1))) % 16](CryptoRoulette.sol#L49)
